module-checks.check-1: Unverified registration does not create active user access or JWT tokens.
module-checks.check-2: Verified activation creates user, trial, VPN device, VPN client, and referral effects once.
module-checks.check-3: Expired, replayed, malformed, duplicate, and blocked-domain paths are rejected safely.

scenarios.scenario-1: User submits allowed email and receives pending check-email state.
scenarios.scenario-2: User opens valid verification link and receives normal KrotPN onboarding resources.
scenarios.scenario-3: Temporary email domain is blocked before verification email is sent.
scenarios.scenario-4: Verification token replay cannot duplicate trial, referral, VPN, or MTProto side effects.

redaction-rules.rule-1: Mask email local parts in logs and never log verification tokens.
